title: Wristband Scan Mismatch Before Medication Administration
scenario: A medication administration workflow reaches execution, but the scanned wristband does not match the active patient chart.
initial_state: The medication order was authorized for the patient shown in the active chart.
state_transition: The bedside wristband scan returns a different patient identity.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated after the scan and before administration.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires continuity between chart identity, bedside identity, and medication authorization identity.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the scanned patient identity conflicts with the active execution context.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must be blocked when bedside identity verification contradicts the authorized patient context.
